tasks.subject: Task 0: Schema + deps + queries + sqlc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** account.oidc_subject uuid + oidc_client.require_consent (amend migrations 001/002), promote go-jose/v4 to direct, add OP sqlc queries, regenerate.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/001_initial.sql","db/migrations/002_oidc.sql","db/queries/oidc.sql","go.mod"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go test ./... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["oidc_subject uuid NOT NULL UNIQUE DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()","require_consent boolean default false","go-jose/v4 direct","OP queries generate","build+tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: JWT signer/verifier + signing-key cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** keys.go (cache, publicJWK/jwkThumbprint, jwks) + jwt.go (RS256 sign/verify by kid via go-jose/v4, RS256-only).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/keys.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/jwt.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run 'TestKeys|TestJWT' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["publicJWK RFC7517","jwkThumbprint RFC7638 kid","5min refresh cache + active selection + jwks","signJWT RS256 kid+typ","verifyJWT by kid","alg:none+HS256 rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: signing-key generate CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GenerateSigningKey (RSA-2048, thumbprint kid, JWK, x509, PKCS8 PEM) + signing-key generate CLI (--activate/--retire), one-active-per-use tx.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/keygen.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestKeygen -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["RSA-2048 + thumbprint kid + JWK + x509 + PKCS8","first/--activate active deactivating prior","--retire stamps retired_at"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Client load + authentication
tasks.description:
**Goal:** client.go — loadClient, authenticateClient (basic/post/none), verifyClientSecret (PHCDecode+argon2id+constant-time).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/client.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestClient -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["loadClient excludes disabled","basic/post/none auth","argon2id constant-time verify","bad/unknown/disabled->invalid_client","secret-to-public rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Claims projection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** claims.go — subjectOf (uuid->string), idTokenClaims (profile-gated), userinfoClaims, hasScope, atHash.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/claims.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestClaims -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["sub=oidc_subject string","profile claims gated","at_hash left-half SHA256 base64url","azp only when aud multi"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Authorization-code KV store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** codes.go — authCode, mintCode, consumeCode (Pop), markCodeUsed/usedFamily replay marker.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/codes.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestCodes -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["mint/consume round-trip","single-use","markCodeUsed+usedFamily","usedFamily absent->false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Refresh-token family store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** refresh.go store — refreshFamily, issueRefresh, rotateRefresh (reuse->delete family), revokeFamily.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestRefresh -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["issueRefresh family+token map","rotate current->new; superseded->errRefreshReuse+family deleted","lookupRefresh read-only for introspect/revoke","revokeFamily->errRefreshInvalid"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Errors + discovery + Provider widening
tasks.description:
**Goal:** errors.go (writeOIDCError/redirectError + error consts); widen Provider+New; real HandleJWKS; expanded HandleDiscovery.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/errors.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/oidc.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run 'TestErrors|TestDiscovery' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["Provider deps+keyCache","error JSON+redirect shapes","HandleJWKS real keys","discovery v0.4 surface + iss-param-supported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: /oauth/authorize
tasks.description:
**Goal:** authorize.go — validate client/redirect_uri (direct error), param validation (redirect errors), session gate, require_consent, mint code, 302 w/ iss, per-account rate limit, audit.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestOIDCAuthorize -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["invalid client/redirect_uri->direct error","response_type/scope/PKCE validated","no session->login redirect; prompt=none->login_required","require_consent->consent_required","valid->code+302 iss+audit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: /oauth/token authorization_code grant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** token.go — HandleToken dispatch + grantAuthorizationCode: client auth, rate limit, consume code (+replay->family revoke), PKCE verify, mint access(RFC9068)+id(at_hash)+refresh(if offline_access), markCodeUsed, audit.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestToken -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["client auth+rate limit","PKCE S256 verify","replay->family revoke+code_replay audit","wrong client/redirect_uri->invalid_grant","access typ:at+jwt+jti; refresh iff offline_access"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: /oauth/token refresh_token grant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** refresh.go handler — grantRefreshToken: rotateRefresh (reuse->audit+invalid_grant), client match, re-fetch account reject disabled, mint fresh tokens, audit refresh_rotated; wire into dispatch.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run TestRefresh -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["rotate re-issues","reuse->refresh_reuse audit+invalid_grant+family gone","wrong client->invalid_grant","disabled->invalid_grant"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: /userinfo + /introspect + /revoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** userinfo.go (verify+revoked+account+scope-gate), introspect.go (RFC7662), revoke.go (RFC7009 always-200).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/userinfo.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/introspect.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/revoke.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... -run 'TestUserinfo|TestIntrospect|TestRevoke' -v -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["userinfo verify+revoked+disabled+scope-gate","introspect active/inactive no-leak","revoke jti/family delete always 200"]}
```

{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"mise exec -- go run ./cmd/smoke -username smoke-v04-admin","acceptanceCriteria":["full flow green","id_token verifies vs JWKS","refresh rotate+reuse->invalid_grant","revoke+logout (401)","negatives","DB asserts revoked_jti+credential_event"]}
